title: Sunshine yellow gharara for a mehndi
concept_summary: A light, festive mehndi concept using a knee-length kameez over gharara legs, kept minimal and breezy with just fine gota edging so the daytime mood stays playful and unfussy.

garment_breakdown.overall_form: A knee-length kameez worn over wide gharara trousers with a light shoulder dupatta.
garment_breakdown.silhouette: A soft kameez over legs that stay slim to the knee before opening into a full flare.
garment_breakdown.drape_or_layering: The dupatta rests lightly over one shoulder and does not cover the head.
garment_breakdown.key_proportions: The kameez length balances the dramatic knee-flare of the gharara legs.

colour_story.palette_summary: A cheerful sunshine yellow warmed by an ivory ground.
colour_story.placement: Yellow leads across the kameez with ivory grounding the gharara legs.
colour_story.rationale: Bright yellow suits a daytime mehndi while ivory keeps it soft rather than loud.

fabrics_and_texture.finish_and_movement: A light, breathable weave with an easy swing for daytime wear.

embellishment_plan.density: Minimal, restrained work limited to slim edging lines.
embellishment_plan.restraint_notes: The surface is kept largely plain so the look stays light and festive.

coverage_and_drape.neckline: A comfortable square neckline for daytime.
coverage_and_drape.back_and_midriff: The kameez fully covers the torso to the knee.
coverage_and_drape.head_covering: No head covering; the dupatta stays on the shoulder.
coverage_and_drape.dupatta_or_saree_drape: A single light dupatta draped over one shoulder.

cultural_context.regional_direction: A broad Lucknowi gharara influence guides the knee-flare construction and restraint.
interpretation_notes: Treated as a broad Awadhi-leaning direction rather than a strict rule.
safeguards: The gharara and sharara are kept distinct constructions, not conflated.

styling_notes: Pair with light floral jewellery suited to a mehndi.
construction_caveats: This is a concept visualisation only and is not a sewing pattern.
It does not guarantee that the garment can be constructed exactly as shown.
image_alt_text: A model in a yellow gharara set with a knee-length kameez and a light dupatta over one shoulder for a mehndi.
